title: [phase:critique] [family:backend-fit] [provider_hint:codex] Return one concise line with your initial critique of using Google AI agent tooling as the main backend for Cursorvers.Inc. Findings first, one or two sentences only.
summary_text: - `userError` mapping regression: `handleRiskChecker` currently pushes `result.error` on failure ([index.ts:807](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:807)), but `runRiskCheckerWrapper` returns `userError` (not `error`) ([cursorvers-wrapper-contracts.ts:27](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-contracts.ts:27), [cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:40](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:40)); a direct swap would silently degrade to the generic fallback message. - `formattedMessage` edge: handler treats `success && formattedMessage` as required ([index.ts:803](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:803)); wrapper only forwards `formattedMessage` when present ([cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:52](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:52)), so any future “success without formattedMessage” path drops into failure UX. - Blank-input risk increases: wrapper validation throws on blank/trimmed-empty input ([cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:40](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:40)); `line-webhook` can pass empty input via `check:` with no body ([index.ts:959](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:959)) or tool-mode empty text ([index.ts:865](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:865)), causing “processing…” reply first ([index.ts:793](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:793)) then generic error from catch instead of a clear validation message. - Related validation drift: handler limit is env-driven `MAX_INPUT_LENGTH` ([index.ts:760](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:760)), wrapper hard-limit is 3000 ([cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:43](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:43)); if env > 3000, wrapper can reject inputs the handler accepted.
